items.name_cn:
Coffee Gold Hardware · 26cm
The most elegant Sac de Jour series, a timeless classic. Exquisite calfskin with a clear texture and rich luster, very luxurious! The 26cm version comes with a middle divider, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable for your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury.
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(26cm comes with a middle divider)

items.name_en: 🔥🔝New Arrival👏👉Black Oil Wax Leather/Gold🌈YSL New Bag King Bomb! Niki tripouch is truly amazing! Who gets it! This vintage oil wax leather is just on point! The distressed cracks act like a filter. The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. Medium size is just right for daily outings; fits compact powder, sunglasses, etc. Crossbody is a lazy sister, slung is a cool girl, with a suit is a career woman, with streetwear is a fashionista. Practicality and aesthetics both present.
items.name_cn:

The V-stitching is sharper than a regular quilted pattern. Thick gold chain + metal logo, full of vintage vibes but not too flashy. items.name_en: 💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
items.name_cn:
💰Black with Silver Buckle Oil Wax Leather · 28cm
Niki's design is inspired by YSL's classic tuxedo, with a cool and casual overall style. The bag is made of oil wax calfskin, with natural wrinkled texture that exudes a vintage feel and is durable! The iconic metal logo has a vintage distressed texture, low-key and premium, as if silently telling the brand's fashion attitude!
Size: 28×20×8cm
Model: 633158
